When u go super sayin u cant go any other form
This game isn’t fun because you can’t yell to the the top of your lungs so it doesn’t make feel like Goku.

reviews.review_title: Anime power up simulator game review
reviews.review_description: I really didn’t like it that much but I like powering up into a super Saiyan

Great game it’s just the only the only downside is that if I even growl I get kicked out of the game. I just wanna go you ruthless you heartless @$#%/but of course I can’t do anything because I get kicked out of the game if I even make a simple noise, I can’t tell if he has to do this or it’s like a thing that he wanted to do cause if he has to do this then I understand but if you’re doing this on purpose, please change it because what’s the point if it’s not dramatic and I wanna scream at the top of my lungs it took me five attempts to go super Saiyan because I scream too loud. It is a bummer. ￼
Can’t even scream without being kicked out, it’s not dramatic, what’s the point of this game.
If you press don't use mic you can't play the game it is s**t one star
It wasn’t as good as I thought it was but it’s still good and maybe you could add some more forms in the future.
When I got it I thought that there was A couple forms and ki attacks and stuff but when I completed it I was just disappointed, has potential

it would really make the game better and more fun to play if you added a couple new forms and maybe a new way to power up because yelling and making noise can some times be embarrassing.if you do add these things I will shout out the game on my tt.

this is good but has alot of problems but i dont mind it is in early beta afterall so the problems are the voice meter every time i say goku very quietly i get kicked as if saying goku is bad and all i do is be SSJ aka super saiyan please add more forms and add powers like Kamehameha and especially UI and MUI please remove voice meter by the way add multiplayer and combat and movement also please make it so that there is a setting to turn on right hand movement since my left one has terrible stick drift well its easy to fix my stick drift but it sometimes comes back in 10 minutes or so and each form you get you get new powers example if you become SSJ or super saiyan you get “you idiot!” or “You fool!” aka angry kamehameha and if your base you can do Genki Dama or spirit bomb you can do both the mini one or the big one it matters on how much energy you gain and thats all Bye! have a great time and please do the stuff i said because it would make the game ALOT and i mean ALOT better also one thing add arms and character selection like jiren frieza raditz vegeta and stuff like that, Have a Amazing time :)

second, this game just sucks.one, you can only go SSJ2. i dont even need to Whisper i can just blow into my mic.2,wow. you dont even fight anyone you just stare at floating trees.￼ if i was able too i would give this zero stars and if youre lucky half of one

reviews.review_title: Like everyone is saying needs abilities
reviews.review_description: Needs ability’s and different power ups but overall pretty good😁

You don't even do anything in the game. You mumble into a microphone at a volume level similar to a mosquito hum. This "protect your voice" setting will quit the game when you talk, because that's far too loud and you may damage your voice. Sadly there is no gameplay and even at max power there is nothing to do. It's basically walking into a store and walking out with nothing

reviews.review_title: Stay at a low whisper the game
reviews.review_description: As a connoisseur of applab garbage, I can officially say this is on the low end of low, the end you could barely even consider a game, stock tree asset, literally feels like someone cobbled this together in unity in 20 minutes, you stand still, you stay in the utterly low sound range till you hit max power and then nothing happens other than blatant disregard for copyrights, the trailer literally shows you all the game has to offer its junk

reviews.review_title: It would be fun IF I COULD YELL
reviews.review_description: If you don’t know this game has a mechanic so if you get to loud it will kick you out to “ protect your voice” so it gets really dumb

This game delivers a LOT of joy considering how incredibly simple it is.
If you want to make VR experiences, play this. It might inspire you to work on simple projects you can learn from!
It uses voice commands and no one knows them

There is nothing to do in the game all u do scream
Developers can you please add multiplayer it’s kinda lonely

Get rid of the yell meter. I know its so people don't harm themselves, but i can see that everybody (including me) absoloutely dispises the fact that just simply whispering, blowing or talking very lightly triggers the transformation. If this yell meter is remvoed the experience would become much more emmersive, as we will be able to yell as loud as we want. Yelling too loudly dosen't harm us, and the meter makes this game with good potential, completely unplayable.
Yeah it might not have a lot but it’s has potential. I like it how you made the game respond to your voice. Nice job👍🏼
It is bad
